concepts.name: Same old dynamic
concepts.headline: Tired of the same conversations, same results
concepts.supporting_line: You've tried everything. A different approach can change the pattern.
concepts.photo_brief: Late afternoon in a kitchen. Mother (40s) stands by the counter, looking towards her teen (15) who is scrolling on a phone, back slightly turned. Natural light fills the room. Her expression is thoughtful, a quiet weariness. The teen is absorbed, oblivious. A sense of unspoken distance in their shared space.

concepts.name: Growing silent gaps
concepts.headline: The quiet has grown louder between you
concepts.supporting_line: This unspoken distance feels familiar. There is a path to reconnect.
concepts.photo_brief: Evening in a living room. Mother (40s) is reading on one end of a sofa. Her teen (14) is on the other end, headphones on, looking at a device. A warm lamp casts soft light. Their bodies are close, yet their worlds feel apart. The mother's gaze is gentle, observant, not intrusive.

concepts.name: A new framework
concepts.headline: Beyond tips: a system for real change at home
concepts.supporting_line: Move past isolated advice. Explore a structured approach designed for your family dynamic.
concepts.photo_brief: Morning light in a kitchen. Mother (40s) and teen (16) are both at the counter, preparing breakfast. The mother is looking at the teen, who is focused on cutting fruit, a subtle, almost imperceptible shared smile or moment of ease passing between them. The atmosphere is calm, purposeful, suggesting a foundation for connection.
